roles.title: Field Operations Agent
roles.description: Supports farmer onboarding, field observations, and mobile workflow handoff.

roles.title: Telehealth Access Assistant
roles.description: Runs patient intake support, representative escalation, and care-plan documentation.

roles.title: Farmer Network Coordinator
roles.description: Coordinates regional route support, workforce readiness, and producer network activity.

roles.title: Cold Chain Quality Associate
roles.description: Verifies temperature control, product quality, and export handoff records.

products.name: Premium Cassava Flour

products.name: Greenhouse Tomato Crates

products.name: Robusta Coffee Cooperative Lot

providers.name: Translation Engine
providers.detail: Local translation dictionaries are active; connect a hosted translation provider for all dynamic multilingual content.

aiRuns.text: AI copilot recommends the next best action across AgriNexus: verify learning progress, keep workforce placement moving, review active health risk, advance the trade route, and confirm provider evidence.
Command center synchronized health, trade, workforce, wallet, and route data for Kenya.
Route risk AI recommends prioritizing Nairobi Hub on East Africa Corridor because elevated operating risk may affect timing.
AI trade advisor recommends reviewing buyer interest, wallet readiness, route checkpoint status, and provider evidence before advancing the next order.

agentCommands.response: Done. I submitted the Telehealth Access Assistant application and opened the workforce workspace. Next step: interview support and shift scheduling.

agentCommands.command: I want to apply for that job
agentCommands.response: I heard you. I can apply for the best matched role in Workforce. Say or type "yes" to continue, or "no" to cancel.

agentCommands.command: Workforce, I want to apply for that job can you help me
agentCommands.response: I can listen by voice or text, remember the active mission, explain what I heard, create approved action plans, run workflows, prepare government briefings, advance learning, match workforce roles, prepare accessible telehealth, review trade, run drone missions, assess maps, test providers, and report readiness.
Prepared accessible telehealth support for AN-PAT-DRC-017.

agentCommands.command: create a plan for a rural Nigeria learner
agentCommands.response: I heard: a rural Nigeria learner. I created an agent plan with 9 supervised tool steps. It is waiting for approval.

Nexus Government Briefing is ready. Summary: AgriNexus is a multilingual AI operating platform that helps rural communities connect training, jobs, telehealth, farmer support, drone intelligence, trade, maps, and provider evidence from one guided command center.

nextSteps: Core: Set AGRINEXUS_STATE_STORE=postgres so learning and workforce workflow state persists to PostgreSQL.
Learning: Course Catalog: Courses are served from the local catalog until a live LMS or course provider is connected.
Workforce: Live Job Network: Roles are served from the local workforce catalog until a live job network is connected.
Workforce: Shift Scheduler: Shift assignments are recorded locally until a live scheduler is connected.
AgriTrade: Drone Field Intelligence: Drone field scans are simulated locally until a live drone imagery provider is connected.
AI & Maps: Set OPENAI_API_KEY for live AI.

agentBriefings.title: Nexus Government Briefing
agentBriefings.audience: African government, rural development leaders, funders, and implementation partners
agentBriefings.plainLanguageSummary: AgriNexus is a multilingual AI operating platform that helps rural communities connect training, jobs, telehealth, farmer support, drone intelligence, trade, maps, and provider evidence from one guided command center.
whatNexusDoes: Listens to voice or typed instructions.
Explains what it heard in plain language.
Creates a supervised action plan across modules.
Runs learning, workforce, telehealth, agritech, trade, map, and AI workflows.
Creates auditable records for leaders and partners.

nextSteps: Core: Set AGRINEXUS_STATE_STORE=postgres so learning and workforce workflow state persists to PostgreSQL.
Learning: Course Catalog: Courses are served from the local catalog until a live LMS or course provider is connected.
Workforce: Live Job Network: Roles are served from the local workforce catalog until a live job network is connected.
Workforce: Shift Scheduler: Shift assignments are recorded locally until a live scheduler is connected.
AgriTrade: Drone Field Intelligence: Drone field scans are simulated locally until a live drone imagery provider is connected.
AI & Maps: Set OPENAI_API_KEY for live AI.

latestAgentWork.executionSummary: Agent autonomously executed 9 supervised steps across learning, workforce, health, trade, maps, and AI.

agentBriefings.callToAction: Approve a rural pilot, connect live provider credentials, select partner regions, onboard field operators, and use the status page to verify production readiness.
